name: Laptop HP OmniBook 5 16- Intel® Core™ i5
shortDesc: Great for students and families.
longDesc: Beautiful design with unmatched performance featuring Intel® Core™ i5 processor and 16GB memory. Great for students and families.

reviews.comment: Great laptop, especially for student work.
The battery could have been better.

name: Laptop HP OmniBook 5 16- Intel® Core™ i5
shortDesc: Everyday productivity. Security, performance and durability for your daily work. Suitable for daily tasks and multimedia use.
longDesc: Everyday productivity. Security, performance and durability for your daily work. With Intel® Core™ i5 processor and 16GB memory, this laptop is suitable for daily work and multimedia use.

reviews.comment: Excellent and fast
Wish the price was lower for these specs

name: HP Pavilion 14 x360 Laptop - Intel® Core™ i5, 8GB, Touchscreen
shortDesc: Balance between work and play
longDesc: The HP Pavilion x360 is designed for flexibility. With 360-degree display rotation, find your ideal viewing angle, plus immerse yourself in entertainment with custom-tuned high-quality speakers. Stay reliably and powerfully connected with Intel® processor and HP Network Booster. Plus, this laptop is made with recycled materials.

reviews.comment: Touchscreen is great, especially for design.

I bought this laptop a month ago and have been very satisfied with my purchase. The setup was very simple and the laptop is perfect for my needs. The touchscreen works perfectly. The power button is now more accessible.

name: OMEN Gaming Laptop 17-db0012na - NVIDIA® GeForce RTX™ 4070
shortDesc: Desktop-level gaming in a laptop with a large display for the most immersive gaming experience
longDesc: Upgrade your gaming with the latest OMEN 17.3-inch gaming laptop and play anywhere with the best quality. The future of gaming is here with new AMD Ryzen™ 8040 series processors featuring AI and NVIDIA® RTX™ 40 series graphics. With an impressive 17.3-inch IPS display with VRR and 100% sRGB, this is all the screen you need. With a single-zone RGB backlit numeric keyboard, the new OMEN 17 is ready for anything.

reviews.comment: 4 stars instead of 5 for battery. HP = please make longer-lasting battery? Apart from that, a great laptop with the power and features I need.
Not great. When the processor has minimal load, the fan is too noisy. Had a similar issue with your previous laptop.

name: Dell 14 Premium Laptop
shortDesc: Slim and light laptop for work and play anywhere
longDesc: The Dell 14-inch laptop with its slim and light design is ideal for work and play wherever you go. With 12th Gen Intel® Core™ i7 processor and 16GB memory, this laptop delivers fast performance and multitasking. Also with Intel Iris Xe graphics, it provides an unparalleled visual experience. This durable and portable laptop is an excellent choice for students and professionals.

reviews.comment: Considering the price, this laptop offers good value.
The OLED display has amazing image quality. But the battery could be better.

name: Dell 15 Laptop
shortDesc: A 15-inch laptop with built-in camera up to FHD quality, large ergonomic keyboard and Intel® processors.
longDesc: A 15-inch laptop with built-in camera up to FHD quality, large ergonomic keyboard and Intel® processors. With Intel® Core™ i3 processor and 8GB memory, this laptop is suitable for daily tasks and multimedia use. Its slim and light design makes it easy to carry.

reviews.comment: Large screen and good build quality.
Great price for the specs offered.

name: Dell 16 Laptop
shortDesc: 16-inch laptop with modern design and Intel® Core™ processors and graphics for easy productivity and exciting entertainment
longDesc: Compact 16-inch laptop with modern design and Intel® Core™ processors and graphics that deliver easy productivity and exciting entertainment. With Intel® Core™ i7 processor and 16GB memory, this laptop is ideal for multitasking and multimedia use. The touchscreen provides a better user experience.

reviews.comment: The touchscreen doesn't work very well.

name: Asus ProArt PZ13 (HT5306)
shortDesc: 13-inch laptop with 3K OLED display for creativity on the go
longDesc: The Asus ProArt PZ13 with 3K OLED display and 16:10 aspect ratio is designed for creativity on the go. With Snapdragon® processor and 16GB memory, this laptop delivers fast performance and multitasking. The touchscreen provides an unparalleled visual experience and is ideal for designers and digital artists.

reviews.comment: The OLED display has amazing image quality. Great for photo editing.
Lightweight and portable laptop. Great for daily tasks.

name: Lenovo 3i Chromebook (15" Intel)
shortDesc: A 15-inch Chromebook with slim and light design for daily tasks and multimedia use.
longDesc: A 15-inch Chromebook with slim and light design for daily tasks and multimedia use. With Intel® Celeron® processor and 8GB memory, this Chromebook is suitable for web browsing, office work and Android apps. Its large screen provides a better visual experience.

reviews.comment: Very happy with this Chromebook purchase. Great for daily tasks.
Great price for the specs. Just wish the storage was larger.

name: Dell 32 Curved Gaming Monitor – S3222DGM
shortDesc: 24-inch monitor with Full HD image quality and 75Hz refresh rate.
longDesc: The Dell 24-inch monitor with Full HD image quality and 75Hz refresh rate is suitable for daily tasks and multimedia use. With IPS panel, it offers wide viewing angles and vivid colors. This monitor provides easy connection to various devices with HDMI and VGA ports.

longDesc: The Samsung 32-inch monitor with Full HD image quality and 165Hz refresh rate is suitable for gaming and multimedia use. With IPS panel, it offers wide viewing angles and vivid colors. This monitor provides easy connection to various devices with HDMI and VGA ports.

reviews.comment: The built-in KVM switch + PBP/PIP modes allow me to control two computers with one keyboard and mouse. This is ideal for my work-from-home setup.
Perfect like all Samsung products. Take it out of the box and use it.

name: HP Series 5 23.8 Inch FHD White Monitor - 524sw
shortDesc: Designed for those who want to expand their horizons and make the most of their days.
longDesc: Designed for those who want to expand their horizons and make the most of their days. With a large 23.8-inch display, Full HD image quality and slim modern design, this monitor offers an unparalleled visual experience. Additional features like height adjustment, tilt and swivel provide more comfort for extended use. It offers easy connection to various devices with HDMI and VGA ports.

reviews.comment: I have to say my new display is really good overall and I'm happy with my purchase.
Easy setup. Excellent image quality for the price. I am very satisfied with this monitor.
